metadata.title: Bon Déjeuner RDC — Your Morning Energy
metadata.description: Bon Déjeuner is a breakfast and cereal brand accompanying Congolese families with energy and nutrition every morning.
metadata.keywords: bon dejeuner, cereals, breakfast, oatmeal, energy, nutrition, family, DRC, Congo

hero.title: YOUR MORNING ENERGY
hero.subtitle: Nutritious and tasty cereals to start every day with the family.

products.title: Bon Déjeuner Oat Flakes
products.subtitle: A healthy cereal, rich in energy and perfect for the whole family.
products.description: Our Bon Déjeuner oat flakes are carefully selected to offer a nutritious, tasty and energy-packed breakfast. Rich in fiber and plant-based proteins, they accompany Congolese families from the morning for a dynamic and balanced day.

phares.title: Our Must-Have
phares.subtitle: The product that makes Bon Déjeuner proud

items.name: Bon Déjeuner Oat Flakes
items.desc: Nourishing oat flakes rich in fiber, perfect for a balanced and energetic breakfast.

items.name: Bon Déjeuner Energy
items.desc: A nutritional blend designed to bring energy and vitality from the morning.

items.name: Bon Déjeuner Kids
items.desc: A tasty and nutritious cereal specially made for children's happiness.

items.name: Bon Déjeuner Nature
items.desc: 100% natural oat flakes, with no added sugars, for healthy eating.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Cereals and ingredients selected to the highest standards for your family.

items.title: Flavor
items.desc: Authentic and delicious tastes that delight young and old from the morning.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: A reliable brand present in Congolese households every day.

items.title: Availability
items.desc: Our products accessible everywhere across the national territory.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We constantly innovate to enrich your breakfast and daily life.

about.title: A Congolese Family Brand
about.text: Bon Déjeuner accompanies African families with cereals and breakfast products designed to provide energy and nutrition at the start of each day.

contact.subtitle: Our team is available for any questions about our cereals and products.
